name: ramp-glass
description: Local-first AI workspace cloning Ramp's internal Glass suite. One package per parallel agent.

notes: One package per agent. Each agent works in its own worktree against main.
Wave 1 packages (parallelizable): agent-runtime, memory, skills, integrations, auth, dojo-web. Dispatch these first.
Wave 2 packages (sequential, need Wave 1 merged): scheduler, slack-bot, workspace-polish, mobile-approvals, e2e.
Hand each agent the matching tasks/<package>.md brief via @file reference in Conductor chat.
shared-types is frozen; agents must NOT edit packages/shared-types — open a PR via a coordinator instead.
Only one agent may touch pnpm-lock.yaml at a time. Rebase before adding deps.
